seo.title: Privacy & Cookies | ArdenNest — Ardennes
seo.description: How ArdenNest handles your personal data. Our privacy policy and cookie usage explained in plain language, fully GDPR compliant.

h1: Privacy statement and cookie policy — Festina Lente bv (ArdenNest)
intro: At ArdenNest, we value your privacy. In this statement, we clearly explain what data we collect, why we do so, and how we ensure your information stays safe. No legal jargon, just plain language.

whoAreWe.title: 1. Who are we?
whoAreWe.content: ArdenNest is a holiday home in the Belgian Ardennes, operated by:
whoAreWe.address: Rue de la Ferme 3, 5575 Malvoisin, Belgium
whoAreWe.responsibility: We are responsible for the processing of your personal data as described in this privacy statement.

booking.title: Via the booking process (Property Management System)
items: Number of guests and group composition
Payment details (processed by Mollie, not stored by us)

automatic.title: Automatically via the website
items: Visit statistics (via Google Analytics, only with your consent)

whyCollect.title: 3. Why do we collect this data?

items.description: To answer your questions and provide information
To process your reservation and prepare your stay
To send practical information before arrival
To improve our website (only with consent)
To comply with Belgian accounting and tax legislation

legalBasis.title: 4. On what basis do we process your data?

sharing.title: 5. Who do we share your data with?
sharing.intro: We only share your data when necessary:

partners.name: Google Analytics
partners.description: Website statistics (only with consent, data anonymized)

sharing.noSelling: We never sell your data to third parties. Period.

retention.title: 6. How long do we keep your data?

rights.title: 7. Your rights
rights.intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:

items.description: Request what data we have about you
Limit how we use your data
Receive your data in a standard format

rights.contact: Contact us at bieke@ardennest.be to exercise any of these rights. We will respond within 30 days.
rights.complaint: Not satisfied? You can file a complaint with the Belgian Data Protection Authority (www.gegevensbeschermingsautoriteit.be).

cookies.title: 8. Cookies
cookies.intro: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. We use them to make the website work properly and to understand how visitors use the site.

essential.title: Essential cookies (always active)
essential.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function:

analytics.title: Analytics cookies (with consent)
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors use the website:
analytics.note: Google Analytics is configured with IP anonymization. We do not share personal data with Google for advertising purposes.

external.title: External services
external.description: Our website uses some external services that may place their own cookies:
items: Property Management System: For the booking calendar and reservations
Google Maps: For the location map on the contact page

manage.title: Managing cookies
manage.description: On your first visit, we ask for consent via a cookie banner. You can always change this choice via the cookie settings at the bottom of the website, or by deleting cookies in your browser.

security.title: 9. Security
security.intro: We take the security of your data seriously:
items: Access to personal data is limited to Bieke and Christophe
We only work with reliable processors within the EU
Payment data is never stored on our own servers

changes.title: 10. Changes
changes.content: We may update this privacy statement from time to time. The most recent version is always available on our website. For significant changes, we will inform you via email (if you have booked) or via a notice on the website.

signature: ArdenNest • Festina Lente • Welcoming guests in the Ardennes since 2003
